title: Feds seek lower prison term for $100M New Jersey deli fraudster — but some reasons why are hidden
summary_full: James Patten is the third person who will be sentenced in the stock manipulation scheme related to Hometown International, a company that owned just one deli.
summary_public: James Patten is the third person who will be sentenced in the stock manipulation scheme related to Hometown International, a company that owned just one deli.
